ddls:
CREATE TABLE "adult_population" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the workclasses table */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight, used for stratification */,
  "education" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the education_levels table */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Numerical encoding of education level */,
  "marital_status" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the marital_statuses table */,
  "occupation" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the occupations table */,
  "relationship" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the relationships table */,
  "race" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the races table */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the genders table */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains recorded */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses recorded */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Foreign key to the countries table */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the incomes table */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., employed, unemployed, retired) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the individual works */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the current occupation */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Actual salary of the individual */,
  "tax_filing_status" TEXT /* Tax filing status (e.g., single, married filing jointly) */,
  "health_insurance" TEXT /* Type of health insurance (e.g., private, public, none) */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Whether the individual has any disabilities */,
  "veteran_status" TEXT /* Whether the individual is a veteran */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adult_population_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adult_population_income FOREIGN KEY ("income") REFERENCES incomes ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adult_population_relationship FOREIGN KEY ("relationship") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adult_population_native_country FOREIGN KEY ("native_country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adult_population_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adult_population_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adult_population_race FOREIGN KEY ("race") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adult_population_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adult_population_workclass FOREIGN KEY ("workclass") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workclass */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the workclass */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the workclass */,
  "average_income" INTEGER /* Average income for individuals in this workclass */,
  "percentage_unemployed" REAL /* Percentage of individuals in this workclass who are unemployed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Numerical encoding of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the education level */,
  "average_income" INTEGER /* Average income for individuals with this education level */,
  "percentage_employed" REAL /* Percentage of individuals with this education level who are employed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the marital status */,
  "average_age" INTEGER /* Average age of individuals with this marital status */,
  "percentage_married" REAL /* Percentage of individuals with this marital status who are married */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the occupation */,
  "average_income" INTEGER /* Average income for individuals in this occupation */,
  "average_hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Average hours worked per week for individuals in this occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the relationship */,
  "average_age" INTEGER /* Average age of individuals with this relationship status */,
  "percentage_head_of_household" REAL /* Percentage of individuals with this relationship status who are the head of the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the race */,
  "average_income" INTEGER /* Average income for individuals of this race */,
  "percentage_unemployed" REAL /* Percentage of individuals of this race who are unemployed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the gender */,
  "average_income" INTEGER /* Average income for individuals of this gender */,
  "percentage_employed" REAL /* Percentage of individuals of this gender who are employed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the country */,
  "average_income" INTEGER /* Average income for individuals from this country */,
  "percentage_employed" REAL /* Percentage of individuals from this country who are employed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incomes" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_name" TEXT /* Name of the income level */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the income level */,
  "percentage_population" REAL /* Percentage of the population in this income level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department or division the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* The level of access the user has (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last date and time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
